ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : correlationId, timestamp : now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, flowName : flow.name default "UNKNOWN", fileName : vars.fileName default "UNKNOWN", mimeType : vars.mimeType default "UNKNOWN", errorType : (error.errorType.namespace default "MULE") ++ ":" ++ (error.errorType.identifier default "UNKNOWN"), errorDescription : error.description default "No description available", detailedDescription: error.detailedDescription default "", failingComponent : error.failingComponent default "UNKNOWN", cause : (error.cause.message default null), severity : vars.errorSeverity default "ERROR", category : vars.errorCategory default "UNCLASSIFIED", retryable : vars.retryable default false }

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (vars.errNamespace == "SNOWFLAKE") "SNOWFLAKE_RETRIEVAL" else if (vars.errNamespace == "GOOGLE-DRIVE") "GOOGLE_DRIVE_UPLOAD" else if (vars.errNamespace == "OS") "OBJECT_STORE_ERROR" else if (vars.errNamespace == "MULE" and (vars.errId == "CLIENT_SECURITY" or vars.errId == "SERVER_SECURITY")) "SECURITY_AUTH_FAILURE" else if (vars.errNamespace == "MULE" and (vars.errId == "EXPRESSION" or vars.errId == "TRANSFORMATION")) "DATAWEAVE_TRANSFORMATION" else if (vars.errNamespace == "MULE" and (vars.errId == "CONNECTIVITY" or vars.errId == "RETRY_EXHAUSTED")) "CONNECTIVITY" else "UNCLASSIFIED"

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (vars.errNamespace == "SNOWFLAKE" or vars.errNamespace == "GOOGLE-DRIVE") "ERROR" else if (vars.errNamespace == "MULE" and (vars.errId == "CONNECTIVITY" or vars.errId == "CLIENT_SECURITY")) "CRITICAL" else "ERROR"
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (vars.errId == "CONNECTIVITY" or vars.errId == "TIMEOUT" or vars.errId == "RETRY_EXHAUSTED") true else false
